entry.title: 2010考研英二阅读01
entry.content:
2010年考研英二阅读01

先来首《不忘初心》送给我们自己！
梦想还是要有的，万一实现了呢！

​ The longest bull run in a century of art-market history ended on a dramatic note with a sale of 56 works by Damien Hirst , “Beautiful Inside My Head Forever“, at SotheBy’s in London on September 15th 2008 . All but two pieces sold , fetching more ￡70m , a record for a sale by a single artist . It was a last victory . As the auctioneer called out bids , in New York one of the oldest banks on Wall Street , Lehman Brothers , filed for bankruptcy .

​ The world art market had already been losing momentum for a while after rising bewilderingly since 2003 . At its peak in 2007 it was worth some $ 65 billion , reckons Clare Mc Andrew , founder of Arts Economics , a research firm-double the figure five years earlier . Since then it may have cone down to $50 billion . But the market generates interest far beyond its because it brings together great wealth , enormous egos , greed , passion and controversy in a way matched by few other industries .

​ In the weeks and months that followed Mr. Hirst’s sale , spending of any sort because deeply unfashionable , especially in New York , where the bail-out of the banks coincided with the loss of thousands of jobs and the financial demise of many art-buying investors . In the art world that meant collectors stayed away from galleries and salerooms . Sales of contemporary art fell by two-third , and in the most overheated sector–for Chinese contemporary art–they were ……

​

entry.title: 我的测试
entry.content:
测试标题1

自定义播放器：

可以在浏览器界面按F12，NetWork选项查看图片加载的时间

def abc():    abc=2    a=3    print '123'
居中且有下划线
| 1 | 2 | 3 || :--: | :--: | :--: || | | || | | || | | |

加粗的字，也是加粗的字。

entry.title: 二零一九年终总结
entry.content:
时间如白驹过隙，踏入2020年是要好好计划一番了。在定好大目标后，按照目标再制定详细的计划。“不积跬步无以至千里，不积小流无以成江海”，只要一步步完成既定目标，相信2020会是自己一生中都不平凡的一年!加油！后续……

2019

回顾我的2019：

测试!!!

2020

计划：

测试!!!

有志者事竟成。
